title: HDPE Pipes & Coils
shortDescription: Premium high-density polyethylene pipelines for reliable, leak-free municipal water supply casing.
longDescription: Our premium high-density polyethylene line provides highly reliable, leak-free performance for municipal water supply lines, submersibles in bore wells, and slurry transport systems.
features: Water Supply System: Distribution networks, pump lines, and submersible casings.
Industrial Operations: Transports effluents, chemicals, acids, alkalis, edible oils, pulps, and acts as HVAC ducting.
Hydro Transport: Favorable for fly ash and iron ore slurry transport dredging diffusers.
rangeDetails: Available in diameters from 32mm to 710mm, under pressure ratings PN 2.5 to PN 10.0. Supplied in coil form (32mm to 110mm) or straight bar lengths for agricultural, municipal, and industrial applications.

rows: Potable water supply, slurry transport, industrial chemicals, agricultural bore wells

title: Sprinkler Systems
shortDescription: Quick-Coupled PE sprinkler systems delivering optimized water distribution for farming plots.
longDescription: Our complete Quick-Coupled PE sprinkler systems deliver optimized water distribution for cotton, wheat, gram, pulses, and green fields. Reduces soil erosion while saving energy and water.
features: Lightweight, highly flexible, and simple manual installation.
Leak-proof fittings designed for undulating farming plots.
Inert to crop chemicals, fertilizers, and environmental stresses.
rangeDetails: Diameter sizes: 63mm to 110mm, conforming to Class 1 & Class 2 ratings.

title: Sewerage Pipes
shortDescription: Designed specifically for municipal and industrial wastewater transportation, drainage, and slurry handling.
longDescription: Designed specifically for municipal and industrial wastewater transportation, drainage, and slurry handling. Fused with leak-proof jointing mechanisms to protect water resources in arid regions.
features: Suitable for municipal sewers, highway, bridge, and tunnel drainage.
High resistance to corrosive chemicals, industrial effluents, and undulating terrains.
Absolutely watertight joints completed via click-ring fittings or butt-welding.
rangeDetails: Available in diameters from 63mm to 710mm, under pressure classes PN 2.5 to PN 10. Standard supply length is 6 meters, with custom lengths for heavy industrial sewage projects.

title: Drip Irrigation Systems
shortDescription: Flexible, UV-stabilized drip lateral lines designed for maximum water efficiency in farming and greenhouse plots.
longDescription: Our premium Drip Irrigation system utilizes high-quality, UV-stabilized polyethylene lateral pipes designed for precise, low-volume watering. Conforms to IS 12786, ensuring high resistance to thermal cracking and agricultural chemicals.
features: Uniform Water Supply: Delivers water directly to the crop root zone, reducing wastage and evaporation.
High Stress-Crack Resistance: Conforms to IS 12786, ensuring longevity under high sunlight and field temperatures.
Compatible with Online/In-line Emitters: Supports standard drip emitters for horticulture and row-crop irrigation.
rangeDetails: Available in sizes 12mm, 16mm, 20mm, 25mm, and 32mm. Manufactured in various thickness classes to suit different pressure ratings and field topographies.

title: DWC HDPE Sewerage Pipes
shortDescription: Double-walled corrugated HDPE pipes combining high ring stiffness with smooth hydraulics for non-pressure sewerage.
longDescription: Engineered specifically for heavy-duty gravity sewers, drainage networks, and subsoil highway drainage. Featuring a corrugated black outer wall for high ring stiffness and a smooth blue/green inner wall for maximum flow rates.
features: Corrugated Design: Minimizes pipe weight while achieving high load-bearing capacity (SN4 and SN8).
Smooth Inner Surface: Offers minimal friction, preventing clogging and ensuring high sewage flow velocity.
Watertight Joints: Easy installation using elastomeric sealing rings that prevent root penetration and groundwater leakages.
rangeDetails: Diameters from 75mm to 1000mm. Supplied in standard straight lengths of 6 meters with integrated sockets for quick rubber-ring jointing.

title: PLB HDPE Duct Pipes
shortDescription: Permanently lubricated HDPE conduits with a co-extruded low-friction inner layer for optical fiber cable laying.
longDescription: Designed for trenchless or standard underground laying of telecommunication and optical fiber cables. Featuring a co-extruded solid-lubricant inner layer that reduces friction and allows for easy cable blowing over long distances.
features: Permanently Lubricated Layer: Solid silicone inner lining co-extruded to reduce friction coefficient below 0.06.
Crush & Impact Proof: High physical strength to protect fragile fiber-optic cables from soil movements.
Trenchless Laying: Robust construction suitable for horizontal directional drilling (HDD) under roads/rivers.
rangeDetails: Standard sizes include 32/26 mm, 40/33 mm, and 50/42 mm. Available in long continuous coils of 500m to 1000m with customized colors and stripe marking.

rows: Optical Fiber Cables (OFC) laying, telecom lines
